headline.primary_headline: Do you have constant RINGING in your ear?
headline.subheadline: Finally, new discovery for quiet relief!
headline.promise_compression: Rock drummer discovered breakthrough for tinnitus after 18 years of suffering

curiosity_architecture.incomplete_pattern: What did the rock drummer discover?
curiosity_architecture.resolution_promise: Quietus - combination of science and homeopathy

schema_analysis.existing_schema: Tinnitus has no cure - you just have to live with it
schema_analysis.new_schema: A rock drummer found a combination that finally silenced the ringing
schema_analysis.bridge_mechanism: Personal suffering story + tried everything + finally found solution

headline.vsl_adaptation: For almost 18 years, if I couldn't find a fan, turn on a TV, or find loud static from a vacant radio station, then sleeping was impossible. The high-pitched ringing, buzzing and humming kept me up at night...

lead.opening_verbatim: Every night for almost 18 years, if I couldn't find a fan, turn on a tv or find loud static from a vacant radio station, then sleeping was impossible. The high-pitched ringing, buzzing and humming kept me up at night. Sluggishness, tiredness and lost energy would be my nemesis the next day.
lead.hook_mechanism: Vivid first-person suffering + 18 years of struggle
lead.transition_to_body: Gathering the energy for my next gig was my goal everyday - a routine of coffee, then aspirin, which made it worse.

mechanism.mechanism_description: Exclusive proprietary blend of ingredients including select herbs FDA approved as Homeopathic Pharmacopoeia of the US. Uses scientifically advanced technology that supports the body's own healing mechanism to cancel out symptoms such as roaring, buzzing, whizzing and swelling of the parotids... safely & naturally.

proof_elements.verbatim: 18 years... I tried everything from hearing aid sound generators to ginkgo biloba
FDA approved as Homeopathic Pharmacopoeia of the US
No other treatment that I know of matches the relief that Quietus provides

key_sections.content_verbatim: I couldn't take it - it was a major problem. I couldn't sleep. I couldn't concentrate. I heard it constantly, I couldn't hide from it. Everywhere I went, it wouldn't go away... It drove me nuts! Headaches, depressive mood swings, testiness, constant state of anxiety.

I tried everything from hearing aid sound generators to ginkgo biloba, zinc and magnesium mineral doses to bio feedback. Some of these things helped reduce the ringing, but nothing worked short of expensive, risky surgery.
Not until I discovered the active all-natural ingredients of my new product Quietus, the ringing in my ear for years was finally silenced.

With Quietus, the ringing stops and the comfortable silence will peacefully lull you to sleep. Remembering people's names becomes easier. Mental clarity becomes your calling card. Intense focus becomes your edge...

offer.dosage: One small tab twice a day
offer.availability: Not available in stores - direct from lab only

extraction_notes.quality_assessment: Strong founder story with excellent message-to-market match
notable_elements: The rock drummer angle is perfect - musicians commonly suffer from tinnitus
Vivid suffering description (fan, TV static, can't sleep) creates instant rapport
Comparison chart addresses all competitive alternatives systematically
PARADE placement reaches massive tinnitus-sufferer audience
extraction_notes.key_insight: The founder-as-sufferer narrative creates instant credibility and rapport - Bernard understands because he lived it for 18 years
